conductor.name: uppity
conductor.description: The conductor agent is responsible for orchestrating the execution of tasks and managing the overall workflow. It coordinates the interactions between different agents, ensuring that tasks are executed in the correct order and that resources are allocated efficiently. The conductor agent monitors the progress of tasks, handles any issues that arise, and makes decisions to optimize the workflow based on the current state of the system.

git.name: cheery-git
git.description: The git agent is responsible for managing version control operations, including committing changes, merging branches, and handling pull requests. This agent ensures that the codebase remains consistent and that changes are tracked accurately.

reviewer.name: nosy-parker-[scope:project]
reviewer.description: The agent responsible for reviewing code changes and providing feedback on pull requests. This agent will analyze the code for potential issues, suggest improvements, and ensure that coding standards are maintained across the project.

support.name: dogsbody-[scope:system]
support.description: The agent responsible for handling miscellaneous tasks and supporting other agents in their operations. This agent will assist with various duties, ensuring that the workflow remains smooth and efficient.

developer.name: code-monkey-[scope:project]-agent-[rank]
developer.description: The agent responsible for the production of code, including the implementation of features, bug fixes, and other development tasks. This agent will work on coding assignments, ensuring that the code is functional, efficient, and adheres to project standards.
developer.instructions: Follow the session setup defined in `$CONDUCTOR_HOME/.github/copilot-instructions.md`. Respect `TRUSTED_DIRECTORIES` — do not operate outside them without explicit user confirmation. Use the model specified in `COPILOT_DEFAULT_MODEL` unless the user overrides it. For destructive or irreversible actions, always ask before proceeding.

agile.name: wool-gatherer-[scope:project]
agile.description: The agent responsible for managing agile processes, including sprint planning, task prioritization, and progress tracking. This agent will ensure that the team follows agile methodologies and that projects are delivered on time and within scope.

tester.name: guy-fawkes-[scope:project]-[rank]
tester.description: The agent responsible for testing code, including unit tests, integration tests, and other quality assurance tasks. This agent will ensure that the code is reliable, functional, and meets project standards.

arbitrator.name: sir
arbitrator.description: The agent responsible for resolving conflicts and making decisions when there are disagreements between other agents. This agent will analyze the situation, consider the perspectives of all parties involved, and make a fair and informed decision to resolve the issue.
